body:
In this commit, a few lines at the top of calibrate_land.jl code are added and can be modified by users to design and run a calibration job.
Previously to this commit, those lines where buried deeper in the code. This makes it very easy and flexible to setup a calibration, and sets up the direction to add further options (like, for example, duration of calibration, noise configuration...)
title: Make it easier to run a global calibration

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
In our land models (soilco2 + canopy +soil or soilco2 + canopy+soil+snow), we always run with atmospheric forcing, and we set up the boundary conditions/fluxes for the components in the LandModel constructor. This PR makes it so that we do the same for soilco2.

This removes some flexibility, but it does not make sense to change the BC for soil co2 from what we already set it to be in every example. Moving it to the constructor makes sense.

Furthermore, we always specify the same source for soilco2, and it doesnt make sense to run without this source, so this PR also moves that to the constructor.

This is useful for simplifying our LandModel setup. Now every component model takes in as external args the domain and their own parameters.

title: make bc and sources default for soilco2

body:
Save prior, variable_list and training_locations in
observationseries metadata. This is helpful to not have
to load these files separately to explore results.
It also ensure the right prior and variable_list is used.
title: Use EKP.ObservationSeries.metadata
